refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns TRUE if A's bounding box overlaps or is above B's.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The |&> operator returns TRUE if the bounding box of geometry A overlaps or is above the bounding box of geometry B, or more accurately, overlaps or is NOT below the bounding box of geometry B.

note.para: This operand will make use of any indexes that may be available on the geometries.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT tbl1.column1, tbl2.column1, tbl1.column2 |&> tbl2.column2 AS overabove FROM ( VALUES (1, 'LINESTRING(6 0, 6 4)'::geometry)) AS tbl1, ( VALUES (2, 'LINESTRING(0 0, 3 3)'::geometry), (3, 'LINESTRING(0 1, 0 5)'::geometry), (4, 'LINESTRING(1 2, 4 6)'::geometry)) AS tbl2;
column1 | column1 | overabove ---------+---------+----------- 1 | 2 | t 1 | 3 | f 1 | 4 | f (3 rows)
